clusters.runtime_contract: Guarded writes reject explicit latest before HTTP because future schemas are not compiled or reviewed.
clusters.server_decision: Keep auto pinned to the compiled OpenAPI version; permit explicit latest only for curated read-only calls.
clusters.title: DataLens API version selection

clusters.mcp_surface: request compiler and read-only RPC validation
clusters.runtime_contract: Legacy string ids/createdBy and removed page are rejected locally; getEntries never auto-falls back to v1.
clusters.server_decision: Validate getEntries with v2 arrays, pageToken, and ignoreSharedEntries semantics.
clusters.title: DataLens API v2 changelog

clusters.runtime_contract: StarRocks, mailings, shared objects, roles, cache invalidation, and hidden tabs do not enable guessed mutations.
clusters.server_decision: Index the release note as capability context without inferring new API routes.
clusters.title: May 2026 DataLens release notes

clusters.mcp_surface: dashboard payload preflight and safe apply
clusters.runtime_contract: Unknown/current dashboard style fields are preserved through fresh-read/update payloads.
clusters.server_decision: Preserve current dashboard margin fields and allow guarded save plans; do not strip unknown style fields.
clusters.title: Dashboard margins

clusters.mcp_surface: dashboard payload preflight and relation/layout validation
clusters.runtime_contract: Validator checks duplicates and unsafe names without dropping current background fields.
clusters.server_decision: Preserve widget background settings; generate only when an explicit dashboard layout plan owns the widget.
clusters.title: Widget background

clusters.runtime_contract: Dashboard item metadata owns rounding; chart body templates do not duplicate dashboard chrome.
clusters.server_decision: Preserve rounding fields and keep decorative chart-body rounding out of Editor payloads.
clusters.title: Widget rounding

clusters.runtime_contract: Fresh dashboard reads are the source of truth for unknown layout/style fields.
clusters.server_decision: Preserve dashboard background settings through safe apply.
clusters.title: Dashboard background

clusters.runtime_contract: Tab update plans must keep unrelated tabs and dashboard metadata unchanged.
clusters.server_decision: Preserve hide-tabs settings and do not infer tab visibility from local templates.
clusters.title: Hide dashboard tabs

clusters.runtime_contract: Nested tab ids must stay non-empty and unique.
clusters.server_decision: Append/replace tabs only through fresh-read guarded plans.
clusters.title: Dashboard tabs

clusters.runtime_contract: Generated chart bodies must not duplicate native dashboard titles or hints.
clusters.server_decision: Dashboard metadata renders titles and hints except narrative Markdown widgets.
clusters.title: Dashboard title widgets and title metadata

clusters.runtime_contract: Contents widgets are not synthesized from chart body templates.
clusters.server_decision: Treat contents widgets as dashboard structure; preserve through readback and safe apply.
clusters.title: Dashboard contents widget

clusters.runtime_contract: Unsupported route returns explicit policy instead of a guessed payload.
clusters.server_decision: Do not create AI widgets from MCP; preserve unknown AI widget payloads on fresh-read update.
clusters.title: Dashboard AI widget

clusters.runtime_contract: Unsupported route remains explicit and tested.
clusters.server_decision: Do not create AI/reference tabs from MCP; preserve existing fields when updating other tabs.
clusters.title: Dashboard AI/reference tab

clusters.runtime_contract: Access docs inform policy; no blind permission mutation is generated.
clusters.server_decision: Workbook access changes require guarded plans and explicit approval.
clusters.title: Workbook access basic

clusters.runtime_contract: Permission changes remain outside default delivery and require explicit approval.
clusters.server_decision: Advanced workbook access is policy-aware but still guarded.
clusters.title: Workbook access advanced

clusters.runtime_contract: No embedding secret or embed write route is exposed by default.
clusters.server_decision: Embedding docs are retained as reference; create/update embed routes are unsupported unless separately implemented.
clusters.title: Embedded objects

clusters.runtime_contract: Role docs do not enable permission mutation.
clusters.server_decision: Roles are used for operator guidance and sanitized diagnostics.
clusters.title: Roles and security

clusters.mcp_surface: Advanced Editor validator and bundle generator
clusters.runtime_contract: Generated payloads are validated before safe apply.
clusters.server_decision: Supported methods feed the Editor runtime allowlist.
clusters.title: Editor methods

clusters.runtime_contract: Tab names and required sections are validated.
clusters.server_decision: Generated payloads use current tab contracts for sources, params, prepare, and config.
clusters.title: Editor tabs

clusters.mcp_surface: Editor source validators and SQL diagnostics
clusters.runtime_contract: Source errors are classified without fabricating runtime SQL execution.
clusters.server_decision: Generated source SQL is statically linted and tied to source artifacts.
clusters.title: Editor sources

clusters.runtime_contract: MCP does not depend on DataLens UI AI behavior.
clusters.server_decision: AI helper docs are reference-only for authoring guidance.
clusters.title: Editor code helper

clusters.runtime_contract: Bundle output must pass runtime contract validation before save/publish.
clusters.server_decision: Advanced widgets are the primary approved custom chart route.
clusters.title: Advanced Editor widgets

clusters.runtime_contract: No Gravity UI chart creation route is added.
clusters.server_decision: Gravity UI Charts remain documented-reference only under local route policy.
clusters.title: Gravity UI widgets

clusters.runtime_contract: Relations are validated before payload and safe apply plans.
clusters.server_decision: Cross-filtration informs selector wiring and relation validation.
clusters.title: Editor cross-filtration

clusters.runtime_contract: Unsupported notification patterns fail validation before safe apply.
clusters.server_decision: Notification APIs are allowed only where current Editor runtime allows them.
clusters.title: Editor notifications

clusters.mcp_surface: wizard_native flatTable/pivotTable and specialized table validators
clusters.runtime_contract: Custom HTML tables are not a fallback when native Wizard or registered table semantics are sufficient.
clusters.server_decision: Ordinary flat and pivot tables use Wizard; grouped/pinned capability gaps use the specialized Editor table route.
clusters.title: Table visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: No implicit previous-period comparator is generated.
clusters.server_decision: Indicator/KPI requires explicit metric semantics and comparator policy.
clusters.title: Indicator visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Negative requirements can reject bars or specific colors.
clusters.server_decision: Bar charts are selected by task, data shape, cardinality, and metric semantics.
clusters.title: Bar visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Sort and axis contracts are recorded in RendererVisualSpec.
clusters.server_decision: Line charts require time/ordered data evidence.
clusters.title: Line visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Renderer specs record stacking/normalization decisions.
clusters.server_decision: Area charts require additive semantics and appropriate series count.
clusters.title: Area visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Additivity and denominator evidence are required.
clusters.server_decision: Normalized area is selected only for part-to-whole over time semantics.
clusters.title: Normalized area visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Negative requirements can force rejection and alternate families.
clusters.server_decision: Pie/ring remain available only for small-cardinality part-to-whole tasks.
clusters.title: Pie and ring visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Color strategy must be explicit and accessible.
clusters.server_decision: Heat maps require two-dimensional categorical/date grid evidence.
clusters.title: Heat map visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Route selection is deterministic before transport and never falls back to JavaScript after a failed write.
clusters.server_decision: Maps use the Wizard-first geolayer contract and require validated geo evidence.
clusters.title: Map visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Renderer spec records multi-axis and series decisions.
clusters.server_decision: Combined charts require explicit axis/metric compatibility.
clusters.title: Combined visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: Geo evidence and map route validation are required before safe apply.
clusters.server_decision: Choropleth uses the validated Wizard geolayer planning contract.
clusters.title: Choropleth map visualization

clusters.runtime_contract: No cache mutation route is guessed.
clusters.server_decision: Cache invalidation docs are reference-only unless a validated API method is present.
clusters.title: Dataset cache invalidation

clusters.mcp_surface: dataset planners and guarded update validators
clusters.runtime_contract: Standalone dataset-field operations remain unsupported when absent from OpenAPI.
clusters.server_decision: Dataset field/model changes are represented inside dataset payloads.
clusters.title: Dataset data model

clusters.runtime_contract: Ordinary updateDataset is not treated as draft promotion; requests need exact API evidence before mutation.
clusters.server_decision: Explain draft/current-version behavior but do not invent draft or promotion request fields.
clusters.title: Dataset drafts and current versions

clusters.runtime_contract: Preview is dashboard-only, is not saved, and is unavailable in embedded dashboards.
clusters.server_decision: Treat preview trends as temporary dashboard UI state, not as a persisted chart/dashboard payload.
clusters.title: Dashboard trends and smoothing preview

clusters.mcp_surface: read-only inventory and audit response projection
clusters.runtime_contract: Neither scope enables a guessed direct reader or lifecycle route; artifact is not a generic MCP object type.
clusters.server_decision: Preserve compute as inventory-only and artifact as an audit-only scope value.
clusters.title: Audit and inventory entry scopes

clusters.runtime_contract: Limit docs do not add new write routes.
clusters.server_decision: Limits inform budgets and warnings.
clusters.title: DataLens limits

clusters.runtime_contract: Missing inspector evidence is reported as timing_unavailable.
clusters.server_decision: Inspector/HAR evidence may be imported; timings are not fabricated.
clusters.title: Chart inspector

clusters.runtime_contract: Request-stage null-query failures are not misclassified as SQL errors.
clusters.server_decision: Known errors feed structured classifier and remediation output.
clusters.title: Troubleshooting errors
